BRL.depreciationBasis: live full-series CAGR Jan 2010 → May 2026 (BCB PTAX); horizon-matched at runtime via monthlySeries.fx[BRL]

EUR.depreciationBasis: Bar-signed forward calibration assumption (NOT a literal series CAGR). FRED AEXUSEU annual series 2010→2025 endpoint-pair CAGR is ~1.07%; 2005→2025 annual-average CAGR is ~0.48%. The 0.55% value is calibrated between those frames as a smoothed long-horizon projection assumption — see decision register D1 (2026-05-26) for the reasoning, and `docs/tech/audit-bundle/GLOSSARY_AND_LIMITATIONS.md` §"FX-16 forward calibration provenance" for the auditor-facing disclosure.

GBP.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXUSUK annual series); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

CAD.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXCAUS annual series); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

AUD.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXUSAL annual series); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

JPY.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXJPUS annual series); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

INR.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXINUS annual series); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

MXN.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXMXUS annual series); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

ZAR.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXSFUS annual series); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

KRW.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXKOUS annual series); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

SGD.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXSIUS annual series; negative = local currency strengthened); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

HKD.depreciationBasis: pegged to USD via HKMA Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS); annualDepreciation = 0 per FX model §8.3 — see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

AED.depreciationBasis: pegged to USD via Central Bank of the UAE (CBUAE); annualDepreciation = 0 per FX model §8.3 — see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

ILS.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (OECD/FRED CCUSMA02ILA618N; negative = local currency strengthened); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

CHF.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (FRED AEXSZUS annual series; negative = local currency strengthened); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)

PLN.depreciationBasis: forward annualDepreciation assumption calibrated from long-horizon FX behavior (OECD/FRED CCUSMA02PLA618N); see decision register D1+D8 (2026-05-26)
